sections.paragraph:
-

(1) to become much or many, to be increased, Gen 6:1 to be much or many, Psa 3:2 69:5 104:24 Isa 59:12, and frequently. It is only found in pret. and inf. רֹב; the other tenses are formed from the cognate verb רָבָה.

(2) Med. O. pret. רֹבּוּ Gen 49:23, according to Kimchi and the Ven. Vers. prob. to shoot (either from the many arrows, or else the verb רבב, taking its signification from the verb רָמָה). Hence רַב No. 3, an arrow. Some also refer to this, Psa 18:15, בְּרָקִים רַב “he shot out lightnings;” but see רַב No. 1 .

Pual (denom. from רְבָבָה), part. to be multiplied into myriads, Psa 144:13.

Derivatives, רַב, רַבָּה, רֹב, רְבָבָה, רִבֹּו, רְבִיבִים and the pr.n. רַבִּית, יָרָֽבְעָם, רַבְשָׁקֵה.
